title: BTC Miner
description: Have you every wanted to mine Bitcoin? Now you can!
body:
# Description

Ever wanted to mine Bitcoin in Minecraft somewhy? **Now you can!**

In this mod you can experience the mining of Bitcoin.
You will even have option of miners to choose from.

The options for you mining operation are theese:

1. **BTC Miner (with Passive Cooling)**
 
1. **BTC Miner Tier 1 (with Cooling Block for cooling)**
 
1. **BTC Miner Tier 2 (same as tier 1 but faster)**


## Wiki

The wiki is coming soon, if you want the crafting recipes use a mod like Just Enough Items (JEI)
